event: Government review touching lobbying due before summer recess
why: Window for extending the register to in-house lobbyists

event: Online Safety Act categorisation register published
why: Determines which small/community services face heavier duties

event: Local Youth Transformation pilot ends, no successor confirmed
why: Youth-services duty review vehicle at risk of lapsing

event: DSIT data-intermediaries consultation closes
why: Decides whether a personal-data-store authorisation regime happens

event: FCA stablecoin authorisation gateway opens (£350k capital floor)
why: Confirms no proportionate route for community/mutual money systems

event: Wales: mandatory care-worker registration begins
why: Live comparator strengthening the England-register gap case

event: Adult Social Care Negotiating Body established (secondary legislation)
why: Fair Pay Agreement machinery starts with still no funding conduit

event: Local Audit Office launches
why: Fixes system leadership, not the disclaimed-accounts assurance hole

event: NFER independent evaluation of Oak's Aila reports
why: First real evidence on the government's flagship AI education tool

event: Treasury fiscal devolution roadmap
why: Decides whether mayors get revenue tools or another document

event: Covid Inquiry twice-yearly implementation updates begin
why: Recurring accountability moment for every resilience gap

event: Companies House identity-verification deadline for existing directors
why: ECCTA credibility test; ACSP supervision gap becomes visible

event: Exercise Pegasus report due
why: Cygnus-redux risk: recommendations with no owner or timeline

event: Health Data Research Service first services
why: Statutory footing and SDE funding settlement still unresolved

event: PwC evaluation of the No Interest Loan Scheme due
why: Evidence base for a permanent affordable-credit facility

event: Law Commission final report: co-operative & community benefit society law
why: The reform is drafted; the gap becomes purely a legislative slot

event: Casey Commission phase 1 report (within existing resources)
why: Natural vehicle for care-worker register and delivery-unit recommendations

event: Investigatory Powers Tribunal ruling: Apple/Privacy International TCN case
why: Only live scrutiny of secret encryption orders

event: Lifelong Learning Entitlement launches (loans-only)
why: Confirms absence of any grant-based retraining instrument

event: NHS Federated Data Platform contract break clause
why: The one-shot exit window; after renewal, lock-in is the default

event: Civil Contingencies Act post-implementation review
why: Main statutory vehicle for resilience-framework reform

event: Anti-Corruption Strategy 'explore whistleblowing reform by 2027' deadline
why: Office of the Whistleblower window

event: British Industrial Competitiveness Scheme starts
why: Two-tier electricity pricing begins; levy rebalancing unresolved for everyone else

event: Local Audit Office takes over the audit backstop programme
why: Disclaimed-years recovery either gets a plan or is normalised

event: Revised national curriculum published (first teaching Sep 2028)
why: Clock starts on the teacher AI-CPD entitlement gap

event: FPA funding conduit, social-care bridge, Preventative DEL decisions
why: The fiscal moment most health and care gaps depend on

event: Welsh Basic Income pilot final evaluation
why: Only UK income-floor evidence for AI-transition instruments

event: FCA full cryptoasset regime live
why: Final shape of the perimeter mutual credit and community currencies sit outside

event: SEND statutory override expires (£2.9–3.9bn/yr hits council balance sheets)
why: Scheduled municipal fiscal cliff; failure-regime gap becomes acute

event: First Fair Pay Agreement takes effect
why: Unfunded-mandate risk crystallises without a funding instrument

event: Reformed curriculum first teaching (AI literacy from KS2)
why: End of the three-year AI-literacy vacuum — if the workforce is trained

event: Casey Commission final report (funding reform)
why: The social-care settlement, past the next election

event: Biometrics/LFR legislation expected (~2y after Feb 2026 consultation)
why: The Biometrics Act window; deployment continues meanwhile

event: Pension mandation reserve power window (exercisable once, then lapses)
why: Deadline for UK growth vehicles to absorb DC capital

event: Next general election
why: First with votes at 16 and cheap synthetic media; registration, first-vote and deepfake gaps all bind here

event: Digital right-to-work checks planned mandatory on One Login
why: A privacy-preserving credential alternative must exist before this

event: EU adequacy mid-point review (full renewal decision 2031)
why: Caps how far UK data-protection divergence can drift

event: Ofqual on-screen exams (small-entry subjects only)
why: The assessment-integrity crisis runs unmitigated until then

event: Flood Re expires, no successor designed
why: Adaptation-finance gap becomes an uninsurable-homes crisis

event: Digital Access to Services Bill — parliamentary stages
why: The reframed digital ID legislation, announced in the May 2026 King's Speech; where privacy safeguards are won or lost

event: Single Unique Identifier scope regulations (Children's Wellbeing and Schools Act)
why: Secondary legislation sets how far a child's cross-service identifier reaches — scope defined by regulation, not the Act

event: Growth and Skills Levy — first funded starts under the new design
why: The levy design a funded provider helped shape begins distributing money; the moment to test whose recommendations landed
